meta.title: Project architecture  (+ codegraph integration overlay)
meta.summary: Baseline: eval 系統 (8 features). Overlay: 新增 codegraph 功能模組，包含 lifecycle 命令、discovery 命令、validation/apply 命令。 新增外部 actor: @colbymchenry/codegraph (npm 套件)。

features.title: CodeGraph Integration
features.story: Provide LLM agents with deterministic code structure data through apltk CLI. Replaces manual grep/Read discovery with tree-sitter parsed knowledge graph queries.

submodules.role: Manage CodeGraph index lifecycle — init, sync, status, search

functions.name: init
functions.purpose: Initialize .codegraph/ directory and optionally run full index

submodules.role: Explore and survey code structure — explore, survey, list-apis

functions.name: explore
functions.out: Context (source grouped by file + relationship map)
functions.purpose: Get full context for symbols matching a query

functions.name: survey
functions.purpose: Survey a directory and produce atlas-compatible structure report

functions.name: listApis
functions.purpose: List public API surface of a feature area

submodules.role: Verify architecture proposals and batch-apply atlas mutations

functions.name: verify
functions.purpose: Validate that spec overlay references match actual code

functions.name: applyBatch
functions.purpose: Execute multiple atlas mutations from a single YAML file

functions.name: generateTemplate
functions.purpose: Generate empty proposal skeleton from SPEC.md

edges.label: survey/list-apis 依賴已索引的資料庫
verify 使用 discovery 的搜尋能力
apply 非索引操作，不需 lifecycle — 但 template 可搭配 list-apis
